crisis_response.heading: You are not alone — please reach out right now
crisis_response.message: What you are sharing sounds very serious, and your life has immense value. Please contact a crisis line or trusted person immediately. Sakinah is not equipped to provide emergency support — a trained person is waiting to help you right now.
crisis_response.prompt_scholar: After you are safe, speaking with an imam, counsellor, or trusted family member can help. You do not have to face this alone.
